overall.description: A static first-person view from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom interior at night. The scene features a bed, large rain-streaked windows overlooking a dark cityscape, and a television cycling through various colorful advertisements, news broadcasts, and holographic content. The room is illuminated by ambient artificial lighting, neon accents, and the glow of the TV screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk bedroom with entertainment area

events.description: television screen switches from news broadcast to yellow boxing advertisement with combat imagery
television transitions to news segment displaying red statistics and data readouts
television shows news anchor in suit presenting broadcast content

agents.ego_description: standing still in the bedroom watching the television cycle through various channels and advertisements

entered.detail: unmade bed with white linens and pillows in the foreground
floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds showing rainy night cityscape outside
large wall-mounted television displaying cycling cyberpunk advertisements and news content
curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
glowing red neon sign or holographic display above the television area

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a dark, futuristic bedroom interior with cyberpunk aesthetics. The unmade bed sits in the left foreground while rain-streaked windows reveal a gloomy night outside. The television on the right cycles through various colorful broadcasts including boxing advertisements, news segments with data readouts, and character presentations. The room is illuminated by ambient ceiling lights, the glow of the TV, and neon accents, creating a moody, high-tech atmosphere typical of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a dark, futuristic bedroom that pulses with the shifting light of a high-tech cityscape. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the left foreground, set against rain-streaked windows that reveal a gloomy night outside. As the camera lingers, the atmosphere is defined by the interplay between ambient ceiling lights and neon accents. The scene then centers on the television to the right, which continuously transforms the room's lighting as it cycles through colorful boxing advertisements, news segments with data readouts, and character presentations. This constant flicker of holographic content finally cements the moody, high-tech aesthetic of a residence in Night City.
